marketing_campaign.goal: Grow Instagram to 10,000 followers by December 31, 2026. Current baseline: 4,500 followers as of February 2026. Secondary goal: generate 8 or more qualified leads per month from organic social content.

content_mix.type: Staged listing photos, neighborhood spotlights, market stats graphics
Staging reveals, open house walkthroughs, 60-second Tampa neighborhood guides
Behind the scenes, polls, local recommendations, Q-and-A
Staging tips under 50 dollars, Tampa market updates, first-time buyer myths debunked

channel.content_focus: Market snapshot, one staging tip, upcoming listings preview

send_dates.send: October market snapshot and Westchase preview
Fall buyer tips and Megan volleyball season shoutout
Year-end market recap and holiday home-prep tips

post.topic: Westchase kitchen reveal - 12508 Westchester Estates staging before and after
post.caption_hook: You will not believe this was the same kitchen.

post.topic: 3 staging tricks buyers love that cost under 50 dollars total
post.caption_hook: Agents, bookmark this before your next listing.

post.topic: Seminole Heights bungalow teaser - 1014 E Frierson Ave front porch charm
post.caption_hook: Character homes. Craftsman porches. The Heights is calling.

post.topic: Behind-the-scenes staging day at Westchase with Carlos

post.caption_hook: Schools, greenways, Veterans Expressway access. Let me show you.

post.topic: Open house walkthrough - 12508 Westchester Estates Dr, Saturday 2 to 4 PM
post.caption_hook: Pool. Quartz kitchen. Three-car garage. Come see it in person this Saturday.

post.topic: Client testimonial - Hollis Family, closed South Tampa pool home January 2026
post.caption_hook: Nothing beats handing over keys to a family who found their forever home.

post.topic: Tampa Bay market stat graphic - October median prices by neighborhood
post.caption_hook: The numbers do not lie. Here is what October looks like across the bay.
